raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs Kantis btja
Plankstes Plattuma / lihdseni
eekſch Namma taifitas wiſbap-
fahrt/ un uſ teem Galdeein btja
to Uppuru Galta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no ahrenes to eekſche-
jn Wahrtu bija to Dseedataju
Raimbari eekſcheja Pagalmd/
(weens) bija fahnis tahm
Wahrtim prett Seemeza Puſfi/
un winnu Preekſch-Gals bija
prett Deenas-Widdus Puſti /
tas ohtre bija fahnis tahm Rih-
ta Wahrtim/ tas bija prett See-
meta Puſfi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija uſ
man: Schis Raimbaris / ka
Preekſch-Gals irr prett Deenas-
Widdus Puſfi/ irr preekſch teem
Preesterceem / tas to Nammu
farga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Raimbaris / ka
Preekſch-Gals irr prett Seeme-
ta Puſfi/ irr preekſch teem Pree-
sterceem / tas to Altari farga.
Tee irr Zadaka Behrni/ tas no
Fewja Behrneem klaht gabjetam
KUNGAM falpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch mehroja to
Pagalimu / tas Garrums bija
ſints Ohleſchu/ un tas Plat-
tums ſints Ohleſchu/ tſchetrahni
"
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad wedde wiꞥſch man-
us ta Namma Preekſch-Nau-
mu/ un mehroja ta Preekſ-
Namna Margu/ tai btj peeza-
Ohlektis no tchihſ/ un peezaſ Oh-
lektis no winnas Puſſes/ un
Wahrtu Plattums bija tri-
Ohlektis no schihſ/ un trihs O-
lektis no winnas Puſſes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta Preekſch-Namm
Garrums bija diwideſmits Oh-
lektis/ un tas Plattums wee-
padesmits Ohlektis/ un tam
Pakahpes/ us ko bij ja-uekah-
ir Piblari stahweja pee tah-
Margahm/ weens no tchihſ/
weens no winnas Puſſes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "TA XLI. Nodalla.
Nomihrorſchana ta eekſcheja Deeua.Namm
1. Un tahs wiſfwehtakas Weetas Ga-
nu/ Plattumu un Augstumu : 4. etc.
N wiꞥſch wedde ma-
Deewa Nammā /
wiꞥſch mehroja ta
Margas / fetchas Ohlektis
tas Plattums no schihſ Puſ-
un fetchas Ohlektis tas Pl-
tums no winnas Puſſes /
plats tas Dshwoklis btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Darwju Plattu-
bija defmits Ohlektis / uu
Darwju Sahni peezaſ Ohle-
no schihſ/ un peezaſ Ohlektis
winnas Puſſes. Ir wiꞥſch m-
roja winna Garrumu tſchetri
mitſ Ohleſchu/ un to Pla-
mu divideſmite Ohleſchu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
